<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band04_chunk004.pdf#page=2 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band04 p152 -->

<!-- header: GRUNERTSHOFEN -->

<!-- header: GRUNERTSHOFEN -->


[[File:Band04_chunk004_p002_img001.jpg|thumb|B Laurentius verteilt den Kirchenschatz an die Armen]]



[[File:Band04_chunk004_p002_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band04 p153 -->
